title: Device Home Screen - Internet is off - User Guide
scenario: User Guide shows "Something went wrong" error when opened offline from Device Settings after connecting a new Bluetooth device
steps: 1. Ensure the device has no internet connection (e.g., Airplane Mode or Wi-Fi/Data off).
2. Pair and connect a new Poly Bluetooth audio device via the device's Bluetooth settings.
3. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app.
4. Navigate to the Home screen and tap on the connected [Device Name] to enter Device Settings.
5. On the Device Settings page, locate and tap the "User Guide" option.
7. Tap the "X" button to close the error screen.
8. Verify that the app returns to the Device Settings page.
9. (Optional) If the User Guide was previously opened while online, it may display properly; however, if the app is restarted while offline, the "Feature unavailable" dialog should appear instead.
expected: When offline and a new device is connected, tapping User Guide should show a "Feature unavailable" dialog or a clear offline message, not a "Something went wrong" screen. Tapping "X" should return to Device Settings.
